questions.question: 1. The main reason for using a pycnometer in true density measurement is:

answers.c: It allows accurate volume measurement by minimizing void spaces

questions.question: 2. If the powder partially dissolves in the solvent, the measured density will be:

answers.b: Lower than the actual true density
answers.c: Higher than the actual true density

answers.b: Weight of liquid required to fill the pycnometer

questions.question: 4. The mass of displaced liquid is calculated using:
5. Maintaining constant temperature during the experiment is important because:

answers.c: Liquid density changes with temperature affecting accuracy
answers.d: It helps in mixing the powder
